headline: Cowboys trade DT Osa Odighizuwa to 49ers for 3rd-round pick
description: The Cowboys traded defensive tackle Osa Odighizuwa to the 49ers in exchange for a 2026 third-round draft pick, and defensive tackle Solomon Thomas to the Titans in a seventh-round pick swap.

headline: 2026 NFL mock draft: Top 10 pick predictions off free agency
description: How has NFL free agency affected 2026 draft plans? Here are Field Yates' updated predictions for picks Nos. 1-10.
